lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including large dents and areas of rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and broken components. Several mechanical and electronic systems require repair.
Mint condition.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that's ready for its next chapter? This car is in fair condition and offers a fantastic opportunity for someone seeking a reliable daily driver at a great price! While it shows some expected signs of use and character from its time on the road, it still runs well and is eager to get you where you need to go. A solid, budget-friendly choice for your next journey!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint shows well with only minor imperfections, such as small door dings and some light scratches consistent with regular use. Mechanically, the car is sound, with all major systems functioning as expected and recent service records available. The interior is clean and smoke-free, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. It offers a smooth ride and represents a solid value for a dependable daily driver.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a solid choice for a buyer who prioritizes mechanical reliability over cosmetic perfection. The exterior shows clear signs of use, including several noticeable scuffs on the front bumper and a small door ding on the driver's side. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear; the driver's seat has some thinning in the fabric and there are minor stains on the rear floor mats. While the engine and transmission operate smoothly, the vehicle will likely require routine maintenance soon, such as new brake pads and a tire rotation. It is a dependable daily driver that has been priced to reflect its current cosmetic and mechanical state.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are reliable and function properly. The exterior is generally clean with some minor cosmetic wear, such as small scratches. The interior is well-maintained and shows only normal signs of use.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive evaluation to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and long-term reliability. Offering a sophisticated balance of comfort and utility, it stands as a premier selection for the discerning driver who values quality and proven performance.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to own! It’s in wonderful shape, runs super smoothly, and has been really well-loved. I’ve always kept up with the maintenance, so it’s totally ready for your next big adventure. You’re going to love how it handles—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual, the drivetrain remains tight with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis benefits from reinforced subframe mounting points and upgraded bushings, ensuring the MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension maintain precise kinematics. Mechanically sound with Double VANOS servicing recently performed, the engine pulls hard to its 8,000 RPM redline. While the exterior shows honest road-wear consistent with its history, the mechanical components have been meticulously maintained for peak performance and structural integrity.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title.

This vehicle is a standout example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday practicality. The exterior remains in impressive shape, featuring a deep, glossy finish that has been regularly waxed, with only the minor, expected signs of road use typical of a car that has been driven responsibly. Inside, the interior is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium seating is supportive and free of significant wear, while the dashboard and trim components remain tight and rattle-free. All technological features, including the infotainment system, backup camera, and climate control, are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that offers a premium driving experience for its next owner.

This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior condition, it offers a refined driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality and mechanical integrity. An outstanding opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a premium pre-owned vehicle at a competitive valuation.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by a comprehensive service history. An authoritative choice for those who demand reliability without compromising on executive presence.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved over the years! It's the perfect reliable ride for someone who wants a car that still looks great and performs even better. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m so excited for it to find a new home. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein B16 coilovers for enhanced turn-in response and dampening control. While the exterior displays minor road-derived patina, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering a visceral, analog driving experience that remains the benchmark for the M-division.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Minor cosmetic wear. Service records available. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between a reliable daily driver and a well-preserved enthusiast car. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, with only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use such as faint stone chips on the front fascia. Step inside to find a remarkably clean cabin; the premium upholstery is supple and free of any tears or significant wear, while the dashboard and trim remain vibrant and crack-free. Every electronic feature, from the climate control to the infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and recent fluid services. It starts effortlessly, idles smoothly, and provides a tight, responsive driving experience that reflects years of responsible ownership. This is a turn-key example for a buyer who values both performance and aesthetic integrity.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits consistent performance and aesthetic integrity, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards. With a documented service history and a reliable mechanical profile, this vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of utility and enduring value. Prospective buyers will find this an exemplary choice for those who prioritize mechanical soundness and a refined presentation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a distinguished balance of performance and sophistication. Having been subjected to a comprehensive mechanical evaluation to ensure continued reliability and roadworthiness, this automobile presents in superior condition for its class. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking both prestige and proven durability.

This car is in solid shape, super reliable, and totally ready for its next big adventure. It’s been a joy to drive, and I know you’re going to love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

Presented in excellent mechanical order, this 2018 Luxury Touring Sedan offers a perfect balance of performance and refined comfort. The Midnight Blue metallic finish retains a deep luster, though a few minor stone chips on the front fascia reflect its honest road use. The 19-inch alloy wheels are free

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains its luster, while the interior reflects a high standard of care. Mechanically sound and thoroughly inspected, this model stands as a testament to engineering longevity. We invite you to experience the superior road presence and refined handling of this exceptional automotive investment.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the discerning driver who values both performance and aesthetic integrity. Maintained to a high standard, it offers a seamless driving experience characterized by mechanical precision and a well-preserved interior. This offering represents a superior balance of value and enduring quality, ensuring long-term satisfaction for its next proprietor.

Hey there! 🚗 Looking for a ride that’s reliable and still looks fantastic? This beauty has been my pride and joy, and it’s in wonderful shape! It drives like a dream and has plenty of life left for all your road trips. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I do. Come check it out and take it for a spin!

This E92-generation M3 is a mechanically robust example of the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 era. Delivering 414 hp with a stratospheric 8,400 RPM redline, the powertrain retains excellent compression and linear throttle response. The chassis features an M Variable Differential Lock and EDC-equipped suspension, ensuring precise turn-in and lateral stability. Significant preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator servicing, ensuring the valvetrain and VANOS system operate flawlessly. While displaying minor aesthetic wear consistent with its mileage, the structural integrity and drivetrain performance remain sharp, making this a driver-focused machine optimized for longitudinal and lateral G-loading.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This 2018 BMW 540i is a prime example of a well-cared-for luxury sedan, offering a refined driving experience and a sophisticated presence. The exterior is finished in a timeless Bluestone Metallic that still holds a high-quality shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the black Dakota leather upholstery is supple, the wood trim is vibrant, and all interior electronics—including the premium navigation and climate control systems—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the turbocharged inline-six engine runs smoothly, backed by a comprehensive service record and recent preventative maintenance including new tires and a fresh fluid service. This vehicle has been garage-kept and smoke-free, providing a solid, quiet ride that feels tight on the road. It comes complete with two keys, the original owner's manual, and a clear title, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement, representing an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and thoroughly inspected, it delivers a smooth, commanding performance consistent with our dealership's exacting standards. A premier choice for those seeking reliability without compromise.
